description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural finish and a red-painted grip at the end. The head of the axe is made of dark metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for splitting or chopping wood. The blade is thick and tapers to a sharp edge, while the poll is squared off for striking. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for comfortable two-handed use, with a smooth surface and a rounded cross-section. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the handle. There are no visible brand markings or decorative engravings on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved wooden handle, red grip, and a dark metal wedge-shaped blade with a flat poll.
description_view_0: Axe viewed from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the handle's alignment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden handle, red grip, and the full profile of the wedge-shaped blade and flat poll.
description_view_2: Axe viewed from the bottom, displaying the handle's length and the red grip at the end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved handle and the full metal head with blade and poll.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural finish, red-painted grip, rounded cross-section, and ergonomic shape for two-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Wedge-shaped single blade with a sharp edge and a squared flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head fitted onto the handle.
